title: Staff AI Engineer - USA
description:
Podium seeks a seasoned Staff AI Engineer to architect and expand their AI Agent platform, which processes millions of conversations monthly across voice, SMS, and chat channels for local businesses.

Key Responsibilities:
- Develop and scale platform infrastructure enabling high-volume, real-time conversational workflows that deliver accuracy and low latency at scale
- Design APIs and services supporting multi-turn, cross-channel customer interactions
- Own full development lifecycle from architecture through production reliability
- Rapidly prototype, test with live data, and optimize performance
- Establish monitoring, observability, and operational standards focused on accuracy and latency metrics
- Collaborate across engineering, product, and AI/ML teams

Required Qualifications:
- 10+ years professional software engineering experience using Go, Python, Elixir, or similar modern languages
- 1+ years deploying and maintaining production AI agents interacting with tools, APIs, or real workflows
- Demonstrated expertise designing and maintaining distributed or high-throughput systems
- Strong problem-solving and adaptability navigating large-scale system ambiguity
- Cross-functional communication and collaboration skills
- Full-stack capability from infrastructure to user interfaces
- Ability to perform in fast-paced environments with shifting priorities

Preferred Qualifications:
- 2+ years production AI agent deployment and maintenance experience
- Experience designing LLM evaluation frameworks including accuracy, safety, reliability, and cost monitoring
- Expertise in prompt design, context engineering, and guardrail strategies
- Hands-on experience with LangGraph, CrewAI, or AutoGen frameworks
- Fine-tuning and data curation experience
